x_twitter.label: X: Binary Choice
x_twitter.description: Direct instruction, optimal path with metric, and a sharp binary conclusion.
x_twitter.prompt:
Line 1: Direct instruction (Ditch X, use Y).

Line 2: The optimal path with exact metric.

Line 3: 'Binary choice: adapt or fail.' or similar punchy binary.

x_twitter.label: X: Upgrade Contrast
x_twitter.description: Negative outcome vs. positive upgrade with stats.
x_twitter.prompt:
Line 1: The negative outcome/downgrade with exact stats.

Line 2: Empty line.

Line 3: The positive upgrade/shift with exact stats.

x_twitter.label: X: Unpopular Opinion
x_twitter.description: Bold contrarian take with its specific implication.
x_twitter.prompt:
Line 1: Start with 'Unpopular opinion:' or similar signal of contrarian take.
Line 2: State the bold, specific uncomfortable truth. No hedging.
Line 3: The implication — why this matters and what most people get wrong as a result.

x_twitter.label: X: Thread Opener (Stat)
x_twitter.description: Hook using a shocking statistic to lead into a thread.
x_twitter.prompt:
Line 1: Shocking stat (e.g., '97% of startups fail because of X.').

Line 2: 'After auditing 100+ labs, here is the pattern I found:'

Line 3: 'A thread 🧵'

linkedin.label: LinkedIn: Tactical Deep-dive
linkedin.description: Paragraph-based industry analysis with bulleted takeaways.
linkedin.prompt:
Line 1: High-level tactical hook related to industry shifts.

Paragraph 1: Background context — why this matters now (2-3 sentences).

Bullet Points: 3-5 specific, bulleted takeaways or observations.

Closing: Strategic takeaway or open-ended question for the network.

minimalist_frames.label: Strategic Reframe
minimalist_frames.description: Flip what someone is doing into what they should be doing. Short, punchy.
minimalist_frames.prompt:
Constraint: Under 10 words. Single sentence. No period. Lowercase preferred.

Structure: [Current state] are [Negative outcome]. Or [Concept]: [New Perspective].

Example: 'overthinkers are underpaid'

minimalist_frames.label: Parallel Declaration
minimalist_frames.description: Contrast X and Y using identical sentence structures.
minimalist_frames.prompt:
Constraint: Minimalist. Maximum 12 words. Land on a noun.

Structure: [X] does [A]. [Y] does [B].

Example: 'amateurs focus on the strike. pros focus on the swing.'

minimalist_frames.label: Paradox Reveal
minimalist_frames.description: State a counter-intuitive truth that reveals a deeper logic.
minimalist_frames.prompt:
Constraint: Absolute declaration. Use a colon if possible.

Structure: [Condition]: [Unexpected Result].

Example: 'the more you charge: the less they complain'

minimalist_frames.label: Math/Logic Quantifier
minimalist_frames.description: Quantify abstract ideas using simple math symbols (+, -, x, /).
minimalist_frames.prompt:
Constraint: Non-verbal where possible. Uses math comparison.

Structure: [Concept A] + [Concept B] = [Result]. Or [A] vs [B].

Example: 'leverage: 0 to 1 vs 1 to n'

minimalist_frames.label: Conditional Reveal
minimalist_frames.description: An 'If X, surprising Y' setup that challenges standard assumptions.
minimalist_frames.prompt:
Constraint: Start with 'If'. Maximum 10 words.

Structure: If [Standard Path], [Surprising Result].

Example: 'if you want to multiply: divide'

cold_outreach.label: Email: Direct Pain Point
cold_outreach.description: Solve a specific problem you spotted for them.
cold_outreach.prompt:
Subject: Found a gap in your [Process/Feature]

Hi [Name],

Noticed [Specific Observation]. 

I built a [Solution] that handles exactly this. It usually saves [Metric] for labs like yours.

Would you be against a 5-min chat next week to see how it fits?

Best,
[Your Name]

cold_outreach.label: Email: Pattern Match
cold_outreach.description: Leverage a competitor's success to pique interest.
cold_outreach.prompt:
Subject: How [Competitor] is handling [Problem]

Hi [Name],

I noticed you are currently using [Tool/Method] for [Problem].

I recently helped [Competitor/Similar Company] switch to [Your Solution], and they saw a [Metric] improvement in [KPI].

I suspect we could do the same for you. Open to a quick intro?

Best,
[Your Name]

newsletter.label: Email: Newsletter Bridge
newsletter.prompt:
Subject: [Topic] is changing. Are you ready?

Hi [Name],

Everyone is looking at [Common Distraction].

The real shift is happening in [Hidden Signal].

I just broke down the full playbook on how to navigate this.

Read the full breakdown here: [LINK]

Stay sharp,
[Your Name]

linkedin_dm.label: LI DM: Low Friction Curiosity
linkedin_dm.prompt:
Hey [Name], saw your post about [Topic]. 

Really interesting take on [Specific Point]. 

Are you seeing [Specific Trend] play out in your niche too? Curious about your perspective.

x_dm.label: X DM: Founder Alignment
x_dm.description: Direct intro targeting other founders in the space.
x_dm.prompt:
Hi [Name], I've been following [Brand] for a while. 

We're building [Your Project] and I think there's a huge overlap with your audience on [Specific Problem]. 

Would love to swap notes on distribution if you have 10 mins this week. Open to it?
